_comment: Manual andenacitelli cardId -> catalog card mappings, for cards whose names differ too much for import_external_cards' auto-matcher. Most cards auto-match by normalized name+issuer; add an entry here only when the import reports a card as 'new' that actually exists in data/input/cards/ under a different name.
